recommendations.title: Les Francis
recommendations.overview: Comical trip to Corse reminiscent of A very bad trip.

recommendations.title: Two Tickets to Greece

recommendations.title: Lava
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the isolated beauty of tropical islands and the explosive allure of ocean volcanoes, Lava is a musical love story that takes place over millions of years.

recommendations.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: When Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and refuses to celebrate Christmas, the Smurfs of Christmas Past, Present and Future teach him to appreciate Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Family Plan 2
recommendations.overview: Now that Dan's assassin days are behind him, all he wants for Christmas is quality time with his kids. But when he learns his daughter has her own plans, he books a family trip to London—putting them all in the crosshairs of an unexpected enemy.

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: Lilo & Stitch
recommendations.overview: As Stitch, a runaway genetic experiment from a faraway planet, wreaks havoc on the Hawaiian Islands, he becomes the mischievous adopted alien "puppy" of an independent little girl named Lilo and learns about loyalty, friendship, and ʻohana, the Hawai

recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: In a small town on Christmas Eve, a snowstorm brings together a group of young people. They soon find their friendships and love lives colliding, and come Christmas morning, nothing will be the same.

recommendations.title: The Bad Education Movie
recommendations.overview: Mr Wickers and his class go on one final school trip after they finish their GCSEs.

recommendations.title: Christmas & Co.
